https://openminds.om-i.org/props/identif._instruction: Enter the identifier for legal entities provided by the International Standard Name Identifier Assignment Agency ('International Standard Name Identifier'; ISNI) as an internationalized resource identifier (IRI) following the defined pattern (i.e., 'https://isni.org/' + ISNI).
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/identif.description: Term or code used to identify something or someone.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/identif.label: Identifier
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/identif.name: identifier
